summary: Site-wide consistency audit for LEXA Smart Home platform completed. Tested 7 main pages for hero section consistency, typography, gold accent lines, and theme uniformity.

hero_sections_centered.details: All 7 pages have centered hero sections with text-center class and mx-auto alignment

news_light_theme.details: News page uses light theme (bg-gray-50) with text-[#1A1A1A] for readability - correctly updated from dark theme

solution_detail_images.details: AI-generated images from static.prod-images.emergentagent.com load correctly

navigation_links.details: All main navigation links are present and clickable in header

title_case_headings.details: All hero headings use Title Case (not ALL CAPS) - e.g., 'Full-Service Integration', 'Smart Living Insights'

minor.issue: API returns 520 error occasionally - may be rate limiting or backend issue

issues: Missing gold accent line (#9F8B65) under hero heading
H1 uses text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl instead of standard text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl
Hero uses dark bg-gray-900 theme instead of light bg-gray-50 (intentional design choice for emphasis)
Missing gold accent line under hero heading
H1 uses text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl instead of standard text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add gold accent line (#9F8B65) to Brands page hero section for consistency
OPTIONAL: Add gold accent line (#9F8B65) to Contact page hero section for consistency
OPTIONAL: Standardize Brands and Contact page H1 typography to text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl to match other pages
critical_code_review_comments: Services, Solutions, Blog, News pages all follow the consistent pattern correctly
Projects page follows the pattern with slight variation (text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold mb-6 md:mb-8)
Brands page has intentionally larger typography (text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl) - may be design choice for prominence
Contact page has dark hero bg-gray-900 - intentional design choice to create visual impact for contact CTA

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load correctly, 5/7 pages fully consistent, 2/7 pages have minor design variations)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Site-wide consistency audit complete. Services, Solutions, Projects, Blog, and News pages all follow the consistent centered hero pattern with gold accent lines and standard typography (text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl). Brands and Contact pages have intentional design variations (larger typography, dark hero on Contact, missing gold lines). These may be intentional design choices for emphasis. The News page has been successfully converted from dark to light theme.
